steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
Sentence 1: natural selection was an obvious next step given existing scientific ideas.
Sentence 2: it may not have been a coincidence that Darwin and Wallace arrived at the concept independently.

Sentence 2 follows logically from Sentence 1 — if the idea was obvious, it makes sense that two people would discover it independently.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Then here means in that case / it follows that — a logical inference from Sentence 1.

However (contrast) doesn't fit. Moreover (additional point) misses the inferential link. For example would require Sentence 2 to be an instance of Sentence 1, but it's a consequence.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
